title: PinLib
description: A lightweight minecraft library to add map icons and markers for fabric mod loader.
body:
This library is still an alpha release, report all bugs on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/rokoblox/pinlib/issues).

A lightweight minecraft library to add map icons and markers for fabric mod loader.

# Developers

[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/rokoblox/pinlib)

[API docs](https://github.com/rokoblox/pinlib/wiki) (Unfinished)
